product_overview: NavalhIA is an on‑prem admin panel for a single barbershop installation that provides staff and service management, appointment scheduling with conflict rules, client management, and a WhatsApp booking bot with conversational logging. The MVP focuses on core operational flows required for a barbershop to run daily operations locally without external billing or advanced automations.
core_goals: Allow an administrator to authenticate and complete initial setup for a single barbershop installation.
Manage barbers (staff), their availability, and service definitions so the shop operator can configure offerings.
Create, edit and cancel customer appointments, enforcing one booking per barber per slot.
Maintain a searchable client database with visit and spending history.
Receive and respond to WhatsApp messages via the integrated bot, consult services/barbers/agenda, create clients automatically, and create appointments only after explicit customer confirmation.
Persist and review conversation logs and WhatsApp actions for audit and operational review.

features.name: Authentication (Admin Login)
features.description: Allow administrators to sign in to access the admin panel and reach protected workflows.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit login form -> See admin dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password (incorrect) -> Submit login form -> See validation or authentication error prompting correction

features.name: Onboarding and initial setup
features.description: Guided first-run flow to register establishment basic data so the app operates against a single barbershop instance.
user_flows: Navigate to /onboarding -> Enter establishment name, phone, email and address -> Submit setup -> See confirmation and access to admin dashboard

features.name: Establishment settings
features.description: View and update the shop's basic information and working parameters used across the app.
user_flows: Sign in -> Open establishment settings from dashboard -> Edit name, phone, email or address -> Save changes -> See updated establishment details reflected in settings

features.name: Barbers management (CRUD & schedule)
features.description: Create, update, deactivate and maintain barber profiles and their working schedules so admins control staff availability.
user_flows: Sign in -> Open barbers section -> Create a new barber by entering name and working hours -> Save barber -> See new barber appear as active
Sign in -> Open barbers section -> Select an existing barber -> Update working hours or status -> Save changes -> See updated schedule and status
Sign in -> Open barbers section -> Start create barber -> Leave required fields blank -> Submit form -> See validation errors for required fields

features.name: Services management (CRUD)
features.description: Define services with price, duration and category so appointments can be created against available services.
user_flows: Sign in -> Open services section -> Create a new service with name, duration and price -> Save service -> See service listed and available for booking
Sign in -> Open services section -> Edit an existing service's price or duration -> Save changes -> See updated service details

features.name: Clients management
features.description: Create and search client records; view client notes and historical visits to support bookings and loyalty tracking.
user_flows: Sign in -> Open clients section -> Create client with name and phone -> Save client -> See client listed with empty visit history
Sign in -> Open clients section -> Search by phone or name -> See matching client(s) in results -> Open client to view visit and spending history

features.name: Appointments (create, edit, cancel) with conflict rule
features.description: Schedule appointments against services and barbers, enforce one appointment per barber per slot, and allow edits or cancellations.
user_flows: Sign in -> Open appointments -> Start new appointment -> Select barber -> Select service -> Choose date and time that is available -> Select or create client -> Confirm appointment -> See appointment scheduled on calendar
Sign in -> Open appointments -> Start new appointment -> Select a date/time already occupied by another appointment -> Submit booking -> See scheduling conflict error prompting a different slot
Sign in -> Open appointments -> Open an existing appointment -> Change date/time to an available slot -> Save changes -> See appointment updated
Sign in -> Open appointments -> Open an existing appointment -> Choose cancel appointment -> Confirm cancellation -> See appointment status changed to cancelled

features.name: Loyalty (read-only)
features.description: Inspect the list of configured rewards and past redemptions to understand customer incentives (view only in MVP).
user_flows: Sign in -> Open loyalty section -> View list of rewards and redemptions -> Open a reward to see its details

features.name: WhatsApp booking bot (BarbeiroBot) - customer conversational flow
features.description: Receive incoming WhatsApp messages, consult services/barbers/agenda, auto-create clients by phone, and create appointments only after explicit customer confirmation. All interactions are logged.
user_flows: Receive a WhatsApp message from a phone number -> System identifies existing client or creates a new client record by phone -> Agent replies proposing services or available barbers and slots -> Customer requests a specific service and confirms a slot -> System creates the appointment and logs the booking in the conversation history

Receive a WhatsApp message asking about services -> Agent replies with the list of services and durations -> Customer asks for available times -> Agent replies with available slots for a chosen barber -> Customer cancels request -> Agent acknowledges and logs the cancellation

features.name: Admin inbox and conversation logs
features.description: Provide an internal inbox where administrators can review WhatsApp conversations, see timestamps and actions (client creation, appointment creation) and audit activity.
user_flows: Sign in -> Open inbox -> See a list of recent conversations with phones and timestamps -> Open a conversation thread -> See full message history and recorded actions (client created, appointment created)
Sign in -> Open inbox -> Filter or search conversation logs by phone or date -> Open filtered result -> See matching conversation entries with timestamps and action metadata

project.name: NavalhIA
project.description: Plataforma SaaS multi-tenant para barbearias: painel administrativo (React), API Node/Express (Postgres), assinaturas Stripe, integração WhatsApp via Uazapi, agente de IA (OpenAI) com fila de jobs, base de conhecimento (S3 + ingestão PDF/DOC), automações opcionais via n8n.

backend.deployment: serverless-http compatível; scripts AWS para API estática

major_directories.role: SPA — páginas, layouts, componentes WhatsApp, dashboard, planos, auth
API REST sob /api, workers (ai-worker), rotas por domínio

routers: /auth — login, registro, recuperação de senha, JWT
/webhooks — Stripe, Uazapi (/webhooks/uazapi no app), WhatsApp legado

product_features: Multi-tenant com barbearias/filiais e controle de plano (upgrade gate no front)
Billing recorrente Stripe + webhook + fluxo pós-checkout

product_features.WhatsApp: conexão Uazapi, inbox interno, handoff humano/IA, stickers

product_features.IA: worker assíncrono, simulação, versões de prompt, benchmark suite, knowledge RAG

frontend_routes_summary.app_shell: /app/* — dashboard, agendamentos, barbeiros, serviços, clientes, fidelidade, integrações, whatsapp-interno (condicional), configurações, relatórios, planos, ajuda

test_artifacts.frontend_tests: Vitest em src; Playwright em e2e ou playwright config

notes: Repositório sem .testsprite/config.json até primeira inicialização TestSprite (bootstrap).
